summary: Full implementation spec for T12. Creates pipeline.py with SelectionConfig (dataclass, slots=True), three individually testable pure functions (filter_signals, rank_signals, select_top), a private _compute_weighted_score helper, two protocol-conforming stubs (WeightedRankingModel, ConfiguredSelector), and the SelectionPipeline orchestrator. Modifies selection/__init__.py to export SelectionPipeline and SelectionConfig. Specifies 17 contract tests.
next_action: Send spec to Manager for review.
